project_overview.vibe: Authority, clarity, function-first. High-end EdTech / SaaS.
project_overview.primary_audience: Students preparing for IIT-JAM and Teachers managing content.

layout.marketing_spacing: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, py-24. Overlapping sections, bento grid for features.
layout.dashboard_spacing: Dense 'Control Room' grid. gap-4 or gap-6. p-6 internal padding.
layout.radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm for a sharp, authoritative tech feel.

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-zinc-200/50
surfaces.dashboard_cards: Grid Borders: Flat background, 1px solid border-zinc-200, no shadow. On hover: shadow-sm, border-zinc-300.
surfaces.marketing_cards: 1px subtle border, sharp corners, minimal shadows.

component_rules.buttons: Sharp corners. Primary: bg-[#1D4ED8] text-white hover:bg-[#1E3A8A]. Secondary: border border-[#E4E4E7] bg-white text-[#09090B] hover:bg-[#F4F4F5].
component_rules.inputs: Shadcn defaults customized to rounded-none or rounded-sm, border-[#E4E4E7], focus-visible:ring-[#1D4ED8].
component_rules.navigation: Sticky nav with Logo, Links, and Login/Register CTA. Mobile menu must use hamburger, desktop must show all links.
component_rules.tables: Shadcn Table for course/student management. Left-aligned, dense padding.

testing.data_testid_rule: ALL interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes in kebab-case, e.g., data-testid="login-submit-button".

hero_background.description: Student studying in library for the main landing page hero section.

student_dashboard_welcome.description: Focused student for dashboard welcome banner.

live_class_thumbnail.description: Professor teaching a classroom, used for Live Class schedule thumbnails.

teacher_profile_avatar.description: Confident professor, used for teacher dashboard avatar and course instructor profiles.

partner_logo.description: Example partner/sponsor logo for 'Trusted by' section on landing page.

pages.landing_page: Marketing focused. Big typography. Bento grid for features. Clear CTAs for Student/Teacher registration.
pages.auth: Split screen. Left: clean form. Right: contextual image or testimonial overlay.
pages.student_dashboard: Control room layout. Top: Stats (courses, tests). Middle: Upcoming live classes. Bottom: recent assignments.
pages.teacher_dashboard: Data-heavy. Tabs for Courses, Batches, Tests. Table views for student lists. Quick action buttons for 'Go Live' or 'Upload Note'.

icons.instruction: Use lucide-react for all UI icons. Size 16px to 24px depending on context. Stroke width 2 or 1.5 for elegance.
